item.title: Wholesale Hemp-Cotton T-Shirt | Hand-Drawn Duck Graphic Print
item.description: Focus on ultimate comfort. Made from a breathable hemp-cotton knit blend, known for its soft, cool, drapey feel and moisture-wicking performance.
